skills.description_cn: 锁定技，你的红桃手牌视为【杀】。你的红桃【杀】无距离和次数限制且不能被抵消。
skills.description_en: Locked: Your Heart hand cards are treated as [Kill]. Your Heart [Kill] has no distance or frequency limit and cannot be negated.

skills.description_cn: 锁定技，当你受到1点伤害后，你令伤害来源获得1枚「梦魇」标记。当你死亡时，你令「梦魇」数最多的一名其他角色判定，若结果不为【桃】或【桃园结义】，你令其死亡。
skills.description_en: Locked: When you take 1 damage, give the damage source 1 Nightmare token. When you die, the character with the most Nightmare tokens makes a judgment; if the result is not [Peach] or [Peach Garden Oath], that character dies.

skills.description_cn: 摸牌阶段，你可以改为亮出牌堆顶的五张牌，然后获得每种花色的牌各一张。
skills.description_en: During your draw phase, you may instead reveal the top 5 cards of the deck and take one card of each suit.

skills.description_cn: 出牌阶段限一次，你可以观看一名其他角色的手牌，然后你可以展示其中一张红桃牌并选择一项：1.弃置此牌；2.将此牌置于牌堆顶。
skills.description_en: Once per Play Phase: View another character's hand cards. You may reveal one Heart card and choose: 1. Discard it; 2. Place it on top of the deck.

skills.description_cn: 弃牌阶段结束时，若你本阶段弃置过至少两张手牌，你可以选择令所有角色：1.各回复1点体力；2.各失去1点体力。
skills.description_en: At the end of your discard phase, if you discarded at least 2 hand cards this phase, choose: all characters 1. each recover 1 HP; or 2. each lose 1 HP.

skills.description_cn: 限定技，出牌阶段，你可以选择至多三名角色，对其造成共计至多3点火焰伤害。若你将对一名角色分配至少2点伤害，你须先弃置四张花色各不相同的手牌并失去3点体力。
skills.description_en: Limited: During your Play Phase, choose up to 3 characters and deal them a combined total of up to 3 Fire damage. To assign 2 or more damage to a single character, you must first discard 4 cards of different suits and lose 3 HP.

skills.description_cn: 游戏开始时，你将牌堆顶的七张牌暗置于你的武将牌上，称为「星」，然后你可以用任意张手牌替换等量「星」。摸牌阶段结束时，你可以用任意张手牌替换等量「星」。
skills.description_en: At game start, place the top 7 deck cards face-down on your general card as Stars. You may swap any number of hand cards with an equal number of Stars. At the end of your draw phase, you may again swap any number of hand cards with an equal number of Stars.

skills.description_cn: 结束阶段，你可以移去一张「星」并选择一名角色，然后直到你的下回合开始，当其受到火焰伤害时，此伤害+1。
skills.description_en: During your end phase, remove 1 Star and choose a character. Until your next turn begins, Fire damage that character takes is increased by 1.

skills.description_cn: 结束阶段，你可以移去任意张「星」并选择等量角色，然后直到你的下回合开始，当其受到非雷电伤害时，防止此伤害。
skills.description_en: During your end phase, remove any number of Stars and choose an equal number of characters. Until your next turn begins, non-Lightning damage those characters take is prevented.

skills.description_cn: 当你受到1点伤害后，你可以随机获得每名其他角色区域里的一张牌，然后翻面。
skills.description_en: When you take 1 damage, you may randomly take 1 card from each other character's area, then flip your general card.

skills.description_cn: 锁定技，其他角色计算与你的距离+1。
skills.description_en: Locked: Other characters calculate their distance to you as +1.

skills.description_cn: 锁定技，游戏开始时，你获得2枚「暴怒」标记。当你造成或受到1点伤害后，你获得1枚「暴怒」标记。
skills.description_en: Locked: At game start, gain 2 Fury tokens. After you deal or take 1 damage, gain 1 Fury token.

skills.description_cn: 锁定技，当你使用普通锦囊牌时，你移除1枚「暴怒」标记或失去1点体力。
skills.description_en: Locked: When you use a standard Tool card, remove 1 Fury token or lose 1 HP.

skills.description_cn: 出牌阶段，你可以移除2枚「暴怒」标记并选择一名其他角色，然后你本回合获得「无双」且其防具失效。
skills.description_en: During your Play Phase, remove 2 Fury tokens and choose a character. This turn you gain Peerless and their equipped armor becomes ineffective.

skills.description_cn: 出牌阶段限一次，你可以移除6枚「暴怒」标记，对所有其他角色各造成1点伤害，令这些角色先各弃置装备区里的所有牌，再弃置四张手牌，然后你翻面。
skills.description_en: Once per Play Phase: Remove 6 Fury tokens. Deal 1 damage to all other characters. They each discard all equipment, then discard 4 hand cards. You then flip your general card.

skills.description_cn: 锁定技，你的手牌上限+2。当你进入或脱离濒死状态时，你摸一张牌。
skills.description_en: Locked: Your hand card limit +2. When you enter or leave the Dying state, draw 1 card.

skills.description_cn: 你可以将至多两张花色相同的牌按以下规则使用或打出：红桃当【桃】；方片当火【杀】；梅花当【闪】；黑桃当【无懈可击】。若你以此法转化使用了两张：红色牌，此牌回复值或伤害值+1；黑色牌，你弃置当前回合角色一张牌。
skills.description_en: You may use or play up to 2 cards of the same suit as follows: Hearts as [Peach]; Diamonds as [Fire Kill]; Clubs as [Dodge]; Spades as [Nullification]. If you convert 2 cards this way -- red cards: the recovery or damage value +1; black cards: discard 1 card from the current turn player.

skills.description_cn: 锁定技，当你受到1点伤害或于弃牌阶段弃置一张手牌后，你获得1枚「忍」标记。
skills.description_en: Locked: When you take 1 damage or discard a hand card during your discard phase, gain 1 Patience token.

skills.description_cn: 觉醒技，准备阶段，若你「忍」的数量不小于4，你减少1点体力上限并获得「极略」。
skills.description_en: Awakening: During your prepare phase, if you have 4 or more Patience tokens, reduce your max HP by 1 and gain Grand Strategy.

skills.description_cn: 你杀死过角色的回合结束后，你可以执行一个额外的回合。
skills.description_en: After a turn in which you killed a character, you may take an extra turn.

skills.description_cn: 转换技，锁定技，出牌阶段开始时，阳：你失去1点体力并摸一张牌，然后本阶段你的红色手牌均视为火【杀】且无距离限制；阴：你减少1点体力上限并摸一张牌，然后本阶段你的锦囊牌均视为雷【杀】且无次数限制。
skills.description_en: Convert/Locked: At the start of your Play Phase -- Yang: lose 1 HP and draw 1 card; your red hand cards are treated as [Fire Kill] with no distance limit this phase. Yin: reduce max HP by 1 and draw 1 card; your Tool cards are treated as [Lightning Kill] with no frequency limit this phase.

skills.description_cn: 锁定技，你始终处于连环状态。所有连环状态的角色手牌上限+2。结束阶段，你令一名其他角色进入连环状态。
skills.description_en: Locked: You are always in Chain status. All Chained characters' hand card limits +2. During your end phase, put one other character into Chain status.

skills.description_cn: 锁定技，当你受到或造成1点伤害后，你获得1枚「军略」标记。
skills.description_en: Locked: After you deal or take 1 damage, gain 1 Stratagem token.

skills.description_cn: 出牌阶段开始时，若「军略」数：为奇数，你可以对一名角色造成1点伤害；为偶数，你可以弃置一名角色区域里一张牌并令其进入连环状态。然后若大于7，你可以移除所有「军略」并对所有其他角色造成1点伤害。
skills.description_en: At the start of your Play Phase, if Stratagem count is odd -- deal 1 damage to a character; if even -- discard 1 card from a character's area and Chain them. Then if count exceeds 7, remove all Stratagem tokens and deal 1 damage to all other characters.

skills.description_cn: 限定技，出牌阶段，你可以移除所有「军略」，令至多等量的连环状态角色弃置所有装备区里的牌，然后对其中一名角色造成1点火焰伤害。
skills.description_en: Limited: During your Play Phase, remove all Stratagem tokens. Up to that many Chained characters discard all their equipment. Deal 1 Fire damage to one of those characters.

skills.description_cn: 出牌阶段限一次，你可以观看一名其他角色的手牌并可以弃置你与其手牌中共计四张不同花色的牌，若如此做，你根据弃置牌中你的牌的数量执行效果：0张，减少1点体力上限；1张，结束出牌阶段且本回合手牌上限-1；3张，回复1点体力；4张，摸四张牌。
skills.description_en: Once per Play Phase: View a character's hand cards. You may discard a combined total of 4 cards of different suits from yours and theirs. Effect based on how many discarded cards were yours -- 0: reduce your max HP by 1; 1: end Play Phase and hand limit -1 this turn; 3: recover 1 HP; 4: draw 4 cards.

skills.description_cn: 回合开始时，若场上没有「营」标记，你获得「营」。结束阶段，你可以将「营」置于一名角色的武将牌上。有「营」的角色摸牌阶段多摸一张牌、出牌阶段使用【杀】的限制次数+1、手牌上限+1。有「营」的其他角色回合结束后，你获得其所有手牌和「营」。
skills.description_en: At the start of your turn, if no Camp token is in play, gain Camp. During your end phase, you may place Camp on a character's general card. The Camp character draws +1 per draw phase, uses [Kill] +1 per Play Phase, and has hand limit +1. After their turn ends, take all their hand cards and Camp.

skills.description_cn: 当你于出牌阶段对其他角色造成伤害后，若其技能未因本技能失效，你可以令其武将牌上的一个技能于下回合结束前失效，然后结束出牌阶段。
skills.description_en: After you deal damage to a character during your Play Phase, if their skills have not already been disabled by this skill, you may disable one skill on their general card until the end of their next turn. Then end your Play Phase.

skills.description_cn: 锁定技，你攻击范围内已受伤角色的手牌上限-1。若已受伤角色数不小于：1，你的手牌上限+1；3，你摸牌阶段摸牌数+1；5，结束阶段，你废除一名其他角色随机一个装备栏。
skills.description_en: Locked: Injured characters within your attack range have hand card limit -1. For each threshold of injured characters in play -- 1+: your hand limit +1; 3+: draw phase draws +1; 5+: during your end phase, destroy a random equipment slot of one other character.

skills.description_cn: 锁定技，回合开始时，你弃置任意张花色不同的牌，随机获得等量吴势力武将的技能。回合结束时，你失去以此法获得的技能，摸等量张牌。
skills.description_en: Locked: At the start of your turn, discard any number of cards of different suits and randomly gain an equal number of Wu-faction generals' skills. At the end of your turn, lose those skills and draw that many cards.

skills.description_cn: 觉醒技，当你的技能数超过体力上限后，你减少1点体力上限，失去任意个其他技能并获得「圣质」「权道」「持纲」中的前等量个。
skills.description_en: Awakening: When your skill count exceeds your max HP, reduce max HP by 1, lose any number of other skills, and gain the first matching number of skills among: Sacred Essence, Sovereign Path, and Uphold Order.

skills.description_cn: 锁定技，当你使用或打出牌时，你获得此牌点数的「黄」标记，若「黄」的十位数变化，你获得牌堆中一张与变化后十位数点数相同的牌。
skills.description_en: Locked: When you use or play a card, gain Yellow tokens equal to its point value. When the tens digit of your Yellow count changes, take a card from the deck matching that new tens digit in value.

skills.description_cn: 准备阶段，若「黄」标记数大于牌堆牌数，你可以移除所有「黄」并获得牌堆中若干张点数和为36的牌。
skills.description_en: During your prepare phase, if your Yellow token count exceeds the deck size, remove all Yellow tokens and take cards from the deck whose point values sum to 36.

skills.description_cn: 牌堆洗过牌的回合结束时，你可以对至多三名其他角色各造成X点雷电伤害（X为其手牌中【闪】的数量且至少为1）。
skills.description_en: At the end of a turn in which the deck was reshuffled, deal X Lightning damage to up to 3 other characters (X = number of [Dodge] in their hand cards, minimum 1).

skills.description_cn: 锁定技，游戏开始时，你废除防具栏并获得一个额外的武器栏。
skills.description_en: Locked: At game start, destroy your armor slot and gain an extra weapon slot.

skills.description_cn: 锁定技，准备阶段，你从随机五张武将牌中选择任意张当武器牌置于装备区，此类牌：无花色点数、攻击范围为牌上的体力上限、效果为牌上描述中含有【杀】的技能（觉醒技、限定技、转换技、主公技除外）、离开装备区时销毁。
skills.description_en: Locked: During your prepare phase, choose any number of cards from 5 randomly drawn general cards to place in your equipment zone as weapon cards. These cards have no suit or value; their attack range equals the max HP on that general card; their effect is any skill on that card containing [Kill] (excluding Awakening, Limited, Convert, and Lord skills); they are destroyed when they leave the equipment zone.

skills.description_cn: 出牌阶段，你可以弃置一张牌，然后对一名攻击范围内距离最远的其他角色造成1点伤害，每名角色每回合限一次。
skills.description_en: During your Play Phase, discard 1 card to deal 1 damage to the farthest character within your attack range. Once per character per turn.

skills.description_cn: 锁定技，当你成为体力值大于你的角色使用【杀】的目标时，你进行判定：若判定结果为红桃，取消之。
skills.description_en: Locked: When you become the target of a [Kill] used by a character with more HP than you, make a judgment. If the result is a Heart card, cancel that [Kill].

skills.description_cn: 使命技，游戏开始时，你令所有其他角色获得「围」标记。回合开始时，你令所有拥有「围」标记的角色将「围」标记移动到下家角色（若你获得「围」标记，则直接交给下家）。有「围」的角色受到伤害后，弃置其「围」标记。有「围」的角色回合开始时，你可以选择一项：1.弃置一张手牌，对其造成1点伤害；2.若其体力值不大于你，获得其一张手牌；若如此做，直到本回合结束，你视为在其攻击范围内。成功：你的回合开始时，若场上没有「围」标记，你获得技能「神著※」。失败：若你成功达成使命前，进入濒死状态时，你将体力值回复至1点，移除场上所有的「围」标记，然后弃置装备区所有牌。
skills.description_en: Mission: At game start, all other characters gain a Siege token. At the start of your turn, all Sieged characters pass their Siege token to their next player (if you receive one, pass it on immediately). Sieged characters lose their token upon taking damage. When a Sieged character's turn begins, choose: 1. Discard 1 hand card and deal 1 damage to them; 2. If their HP does not exceed yours, take 1 hand card from them. If you act, you are treated as within their attack range until end of turn. Success: At the start of your turn, if no Siege tokens remain in play, gain skill Divine Record. Failure: If you enter the Dying state before succeeding, recover to 1 HP, remove all Siege tokens, and discard all your equipment.

skills.description_cn: 出牌阶段限一次，若你体力上限小于10，你可进行一次判定：若判定结果与本阶段内以此法进行判定的判定结果花色均不相同，且此时你体力上限小于10，你可以重复此判定并增加1点体力上限。然后你可以将所有生效的判定牌交给任意一名角色。然后若其手牌数为全场最多，你减少1点体力上限。
skills.description_en: Once per Play Phase: If your max HP is below 10, make a judgment. If the result is a different suit from all prior judgments this phase, and your max HP is still below 10, repeat and increase max HP by 1 each time. Then you may give all activated judgment cards to any one character. If that character then has the most hand cards in play, reduce your max HP by 1.

skills.description_cn: 觉醒技，准备阶段，若所有存活的角色在本局游戏内均受到过伤害，你增加2点体力上限，回复1点体力，然后令一名角色获得技能「佐幸※」。
skills.description_en: Awakening: During your prepare phase, if all surviving characters have taken damage this game, increase your max HP by 2, recover 1 HP, then grant one character the skill Blessing.

skills.description_cn: 限定技，出牌阶段，你可选择一名角色：若其有未触发的觉醒技，且你体力上限不小于X（X为场上存活人数），则你选择其中一个觉醒技，其视为已满足觉醒条件；否则其摸四张牌。若如此做，你减少2点体力上限。
skills.description_en: Limited: During your Play Phase, choose a character. If they have an untriggered Awakening skill and your max HP is at least equal to the number of survivors, choose one of their Awakening skills and they are treated as having met its condition. Otherwise they draw 4 cards. Either way, reduce your max HP by 2.

skills.description_cn: 锁定技，游戏开始时，将8张【奇正相生※】加入牌堆。【奇正相生】对你无效。
skills.description_en: Locked: At game start, add 8 [Qizheng Xiangsheng] cards to the deck. [Qizheng Xiangsheng] has no effect on you.

skills.description_cn: 锁定技。一名角色使用非虚拟非转化的锦囊牌时，若此牌的牌名属于智囊牌名、「定汉」已记录的牌名或【奇正相生※】时，你摸一张牌。
skills.description_en: Locked: When a character uses a non-virtual non-converted Tool card, if its name matches a Wisdom card name, a name recorded in Grand Pacification, or [Qizheng Xiangsheng], draw 1 card.

skills.description_cn: 每种牌名限一次，你成为锦囊牌的目标时，你记录此牌名，然后取消之。你的回合开始时，你可以在「定汉」记录中，增加或移除一种锦囊牌牌名。
skills.description_en: Once per card name: when you become the target of a Tool card, record that card name and cancel its effect on you. At the start of your turn, you may add or remove one Tool card name from your Grand Pacification record.

skills.description_cn: 出牌阶段限一次，你可以选择一名体力值上限大于1的其他角色，令其减少1点体力值上限并获得「平定」标记，然后你减少1点体力值上限。你对拥有「平定」标记的角色使用牌没有距离限制。
skills.description_en: Once per Play Phase: Choose a character with max HP greater than 1. They reduce their max HP by 1 and gain a Pacify token; you reduce your max HP by 1. You have no distance restriction when using cards against Pacified characters.

skills.description_cn: 锁定技，拥有「平定」标记的角色不能响应你对其使用的牌。你使用牌指定有「平定」标记的角色为目标时，若本回合你以此法获得的牌少于两张，你摸一张牌。拥有「平定」标记的角色死亡时，你增加X点体力值上限并摸X张牌（X为其拥有的「平定」标记数）。
skills.description_en: Locked: Pacified characters cannot respond to cards you use against them. When you target a Pacified character, if you have gained fewer than 2 cards this way this turn, draw 1 card. When a Pacified character dies, increase your max HP by X and draw X cards (X = their Pacify token count).

skills.description_cn: 锁定技，你的手牌数上限等于已损失体力值。当你受到其他角色造成的伤害时，若你有手牌且体力上限大于1，则防止本次伤害，然后减少1点体力值上限并将1张手牌交给一名其他角色，然后若你拥有技能「英霸」，令伤害来源获得1个「平定」标记。
skills.description_en: Locked: Your hand card limit equals your lost HP. When another character deals damage to you, if you have hand cards and your max HP is greater than 1, prevent the damage, reduce your max HP by 1, give 1 hand card to a character, and if you have Heroic Dominance, give the damage source 1 Pacify token.

skills.description_cn: 出牌阶段限两次，你可以选择一名未拥有「五灵」标记的角色，按照你指定的顺序向其传授「五禽戏」。拥有「五灵」标记的角色拥有按照你指定的效果，并在准备阶段切换为下一种。虎灵：若你使用的牌仅指定唯一目标，则此牌对目标角色造成伤害时，此伤害+1。鹤灵：拥有「鹤」标记的角色获得「鹤」标记时，摸三张牌。熊灵：每回合限一次，你受到伤害时，此伤害-1。猿灵：拥有「猿」标记的角色获得「猿」标记时，选择另一名角色，获得其装备区的一张牌。鹿灵：你获得「鹿」标记时，回复1点体力，移除判定区所有牌。你不能成为延时锦囊目标。
skills.description_en: Twice per Play Phase: Choose a character without a Five Spirits token and assign them the Five Animals Exercise in your chosen order. The character gains the current active effect and switches to the next during their prepare phase. Tiger: if your card targets only one character, damage dealt +1. Crane: when the Crane character gains a Crane token, draw 3 cards. Bear: once per turn, damage you take -1. Ape: when the Ape character gains an Ape token, take 1 equipment from another character. Deer: when you gain a Deer token, recover 1 HP and remove all cards from your judgment area; you cannot be targeted by Delayed Tool cards.

skills.description_cn: 弃牌阶段结束时，你可以将此阶段弃置的牌置入「仁」区。出牌阶段限一次，你可以弃置所有「仁」区的牌，令所有角色回复1点体力。
skills.description_en: At the end of your discard phase, you may place cards discarded this phase into the Benevolence area. Once per Play Phase: discard all Benevolence area cards; all characters recover 1 HP.

skills.description_cn: （身份场）游戏开始时，你可以重新分配除主公外每名角色的座次。（斗地主）游戏开始时，你可以重新分配三号位以外的角色的座次。
skills.description_en: (Identity mode) At game start, you may reassign seating positions for all characters except the Lord. (Landlord mode) You may reassign seating for all characters except seat 3.

skills.description_cn: 出牌阶段限一次，你交给一名角色X张牌（X为其场上牌的张数），然后你获得其场上的所有牌。
skills.description_en: Once per Play Phase: Give a character X cards (X = number of cards in their play area), then take all cards from their play area.

skills.description_cn: （身份场）你的回合结束后，你可以选择一名其他角色，你与其随机平均分配双方手牌（若为奇数则你分配较多张数）。（斗地主、团战类）你的回合结束后，你可选择一名手牌数不大于x的其他角色（x为你的手牌数+1），你与其随机平均分配双方手牌（若为奇数则你分配较多张数）。
skills.description_en: (Identity mode) After your turn ends, choose another character and randomly redistribute both your hand cards evenly; you keep the extra if odd. (Landlord/Team mode) After your turn ends, choose a character with hand cards not exceeding your count +1 and redistribute both hands evenly; you keep the extra if odd.

skills.description_cn: 出牌阶段限一次，你可观看牌堆顶五张牌，用任意张手牌与其中等量牌进行交换并排序，然后你令一名其他角色展示你手牌与牌堆顶共五张牌，你对其依次使用其中的【杀】。
skills.description_en: Once per Play Phase: View the top 5 cards of the deck. Swap any number of hand cards with an equal number of those cards and arrange them. Then have one other character reveal a combined 5 cards from your hand and the top of the deck; use any [Kill] among them against that character in sequence.

skills.description_cn: 锁定技，结束阶段，你选择一个区域并弃置其中所有牌，然后依次弃置任意名其他角色相同区域各一张牌，因此弃置牌且未弃置【杀】的角色失去1点体力。
skills.description_en: Locked: During your end phase, choose an area and discard all cards in it. Then discard 1 card from that same area of any number of other characters. Characters who discarded but had no [Kill] among them lose 1 HP.

skills.description_cn: 限定技，你进入濒死时，可回复X点体力（X为你本局游戏进入过濒死的次数），对一名角色造成等量雷电伤害并获得「回天」。
skills.description_en: Limited: When you enter the Dying state, recover X HP (X = number of times you have entered Dying this game), deal that much Lightning damage to one character, and gain Return of Heaven.

skills.description_cn: 一名体力值大于你的角色回合结束时，你可摸一张牌并执行一个额外的回合。每轮开始时，若你发动过此技能，你死亡。
skills.description_en: When a character with more HP than you ends their turn, draw 1 card and take an extra turn. At the start of each round, if you have activated this skill, you die.
